Does SAP integrate with your tools?
The inventory module monitors stock levels, and the system integrates all the data.
Daniela, can you walk me through how SAP works at your company?
Sure. We use SAP for all operations. The finance module tracks every payment.
And the inventory? How do you handle stock levels?
The inventory module monitors stock in real time, and it integrates with sales.
So what happens when a customer places an order online?
The system processes the order and sends it to the warehouse automatically.
Impressive. Do you customize the modules, or use them as they are?
We customize each one, and we plan to deploy a new version next quarter.
We use SAP for all our operations.
This module handles inventory management.
The system integrates with our database.
We are implementing a new workflow.
Could you walk me through the process?

Hi Daniela, it is Sarah, your English coach. Today, listen to one short voice note about describing systems and technology in English. When you explain how a system works, use the present simple, because these are facts that are always true. So you say, SAP processes thousands of transactions every day. The finance module tracks every payment. The system integrates sales and logistics into one platform. Notice the s at the end. With he, she or it, and with words like the system or the module, the verb takes an s. The system process es. The module track s. For a question, use does. Does SAP integrate with your other tools? For a negative, use does not. The system does not make mistakes. Try it now. Choose one tool you use at work, and describe what it does, what it tracks, and how it helps your team. Talk soon, Daniela.

Hello Daniela, this is Marcus from the Nike team in the United States. Thank you for the SAP overview. Let me repeat what I understood, so please correct me if I am wrong. So, your company uses SAP for all operations. The finance module tracks every payment automatically, and the inventory module monitors stock levels in real time. When a customer places an order on the Centauro website, the system sends the information straight to the warehouse. The platform integrates sales, logistics and finance, so the teams work with the same data. You also customize each module to fit the business, and you plan to deploy a new version next quarter. This is very helpful for our partnership. One question. Does the system also connect with our reporting tools? Please confirm when you can. Thank you again, Daniela. Talk soon.
